articles.title: DR Congo: DRC Ebola outbreak response needs urgent scale-up after two months

Expanded international support is urgently needed to ensure the response is adequately resourced. articles.title: LabubaRAT Masquerades as NVIDIA Software to Control Windows Hosts
articles.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a previously undocumented Rust-based remote access trojan (RAT) codenamed LabubaRAT that masquerades as NVIDIA software to blend into target environments. articles.title: 11 Old Microsoft-Signed Linux UEFI Shims Could Let Attackers Bypass Secure Boot
articles.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered 11 old, Microsoft-signed, Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) applications that could be abused to bypass Secure Boot on most systems using the modern firmware standard.
